title: Interior Design Intern – $800 to $1,200 Allowance / Month
description:
Job Description & Requirements

📍 Location: 6 Harper Rd, Singapore 369674
🕒 Working Hours: 5.5 days/week (Mon–Fri: 9am–6pm, Sat: half day)
📅 Duration: 3–6 months (graded internship)

About Us

PanelCraft is a licensed renovation and interior solutions company. We bring creativity and craftsmanship together to transform homes into inspiring spaces.

As an Interior Design Intern, you won’t just be stuck behind a desk — you’ll gain real, hands-on exposure to live renovation projects, working closely with designers and project managers from concept to installation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist lead designers in conceptualization and execution of projects
  • Participate in client meetings and presentations, gathering feedback and presenting visuals
  • Create and update mood boards, material boards, and design proposals
  • Support in 2D drawings, 3D modeling, rendering, and technical drafting (AutoCAD, SketchUp, Photoshop; bonus if Rhino/3ds Max)
  • Research & recommend materials, furniture, finishes, and lighting solutions
    Help with site measurements, sourcing, and on-site coordination
  • Prepare documentation to support project delivery

Qualifications

  • Strong design sense with a keen eye for detail
  • Creative, resourceful, and eager to learn from real projects
  • Team player with good communication & organizational skills

Why Join Us?

✨ Allowance: $800 – $1,200/month
✨ Build a portfolio with real client projects
✨ Gain exposure to both creative design & site execution
✨ Grow in a collaborative SME environment where your work matters

📩 How to Apply
Send your resume to hiring@panelcraft.sg or Ryan via WhatsApp [81257108] with subject: Interior Design Intern Application.

Start your career in interior design with PanelCraft — learn, create, and transform spaces.

postedCompany.description:
Join PanelCraft - Innovative Wall Panel Renovation Services


Are you passionate about transforming living spaces with innovative renovation solutions? Do you want to be part of a dynamic team that is committed to delivering high-quality, sustainable products and services? If so, we invite you to join PanelCraft.


At PanelCraft, we are dedicated to providing homeowners with a revolutionary alternative to traditional wall coverings. Our WPC wall panels are easy to install, eco-friendly, and available in a range of stylish designs to suit any home décor. We take pride in our craftsmanship and attention to detail, and are committed to delivering exceptional customer service at every step of the way.


As we expand our business, we are looking for talented and motivated individuals to join our team. Whether you are a skilled carpenter, a sales and marketing expert, or a customer service professional, we offer a range of opportunities to grow and develop your career.

Benefits of working at PanelCraft:

  • Competitive salaries and benefits packages
  • Opportunities for career advancement and professional development
  • A supportive and collaborative work environment that values teamwork, creativity, and innovation
  • A commitment to sustainability and eco-friendliness in all aspects of our business

If you share our passion for innovation and excellence, we encourage you to apply for our open positions today. Together, we can build a better future for homeowners and the environment.
postedCompany.name: PANELCRAFT PTE. LTD.
